title: Fig. 1 in A new catfish species of the genus Trichomycterus (Siluriformes: Trichomycteridae) from the río Orinoco versant of Páramo de Cruz Verde, Eastern Cordillera of Colombia
author: DoNascimiento, Carlos
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. Pectoral girdle of: a. Trichomycterus steindachneri (MBUCV-V-35652), paratype, 86.7 mm SL. b. T. cachiraensis (MBUCV-V-35384), paratype, 74.9 mm SL. Ventral view. Abbreviations: cl, cleithrum; pcr, pectoral complex radial; pr, pectoral radial; sco, scapulocoracoid.
steps_raw: Fig. 1. Pectoral girdle of: a. Trichomycterus steindachneri (MBUCV-V-35652), paratype, 86.7 mm SL. b. T. cachiraensis (MBUCV-V-35384), paratype, 74.9 mm SL. Ventral view. Abbreviations: cl, cleithrum; pcr, pectoral complex radial; pr, pectoral radial; sco, scapulocoracoid.
